title: hypericum involutum
intro: Hypericum involutum, also known as the small-leaved St John's Wort or creeping St John's Wort, is a perennial plant in the Hypericum genus that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Hypericum involutum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
